channel.title: Gitea git /etc/hosts.allow on m-fujimoto.github.io/
channel.description: Recent content in Gitea git /etc/hosts.allow on m-fujimoto.github.io/

item.title: ssh_exchange_identification
item.description: My gitea IP address : https://localhost:3000 % git push ssh_exchange_identification: Connection closed by remote host fatal: Could not read from remote repository. Please make sure you have the correct access rights and the repository exists. Add the following line in /etc/hosts.allow sshd : localhost : allow Then restart sshd : % doas /etc/rc.d/sshd restart
